case_title: JOHN WILLIAM BANNING VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANNING, JOHN WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $20,411.46 PRINCIPAL, $90.04 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,801.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANNING, JOHN WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,196.80 INTEREST, $80.00 COSTS FILED BY ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
